% ============================================================
% paper-to-lecture — Beamer Preamble Template
% ============================================================
% Auto-generated from config.yml. Placeholders (%%VAR%%) are
% replaced by the orchestrator before writing to workspace.
%
% To customize manually:
%   1. Change RGB values in the color definitions
%   2. Update COURSE_NAME and WEEK_LABEL in footer
%   3. Keep ALL spacing fixes — they prevent overflow issues
% ============================================================

\documentclass[aspectratio=169,11pt]{beamer}

\usetheme{Madrid}
\usecolortheme{default}

% --- Theme Colors (auto-filled from config) ---
\definecolor{ThemeRed}{RGB}{%%PRIMARY_RGB%%}       % Primary accent
\definecolor{ThemeBlue}{RGB}{%%ACCENT_RGB%%}       % Secondary accent
\definecolor{ThemeGreen}{RGB}{%%GREEN_RGB%%}        % Success/mechanism
\definecolor{ThemeGray}{RGB}{%%GRAY_RGB%%}          % Neutral text
\definecolor{LightGray}{RGB}{245,245,245}           % Background fills

\setbeamercolor{structure}{fg=ThemeRed}
\setbeamercolor{frametitle}{fg=white,bg=ThemeRed}
\setbeamercolor{title}{fg=white,bg=ThemeRed}
\setbeamercolor{block title}{bg=ThemeRed,fg=white}
\setbeamercolor{block body}{bg=LightGray,fg=black}
\setbeamercolor{item}{fg=ThemeRed}
\setbeamercolor{subitem}{fg=ThemeRed!80}
\setbeamercolor{itemize item}{fg=ThemeRed}
\setbeamercolor{enumerate item}{fg=ThemeRed}

% --- Packages ---
\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb,amsthm}
\usepackage{mathtools}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usetikzlibrary{shapes,arrows,positioning,calc,decorations.pathreplacing,trees,matrix,arrows.meta,patterns}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{multirow}
\usepackage{xcolor}

% --- TikZ Standard Styles ---
% P29: No transform shape. Minimum font = \small.
\tikzset{
  mseBox/.style={draw,thick,rounded corners,align=center,font=\small,inner sep=2pt},
  mseArrow/.style={->,thick,>=stealth},
  mseEdgeLabel/.style={font=\small,inner sep=1pt,align=center},  % PTL-014: no fill=white; use separate \node at explicit coords
  mseLegend/.style={draw,thick,rounded corners,fill=white,fill opacity=1,text opacity=1,inner sep=2pt,font=\small,align=left},
}

% --- Interactive Boxes (Socratic pedagogy) ---
\newcommand{\think}[1]{%
  \par\vspace{3pt}\noindent\centering
  \fcolorbox{ThemeRed}{LightGray}{\parbox{0.85\textwidth}{%
    \textcolor{ThemeRed}{\textbf{Think First:}} #1}}\par\vspace{3pt}%
}

\newcommand{\keyinsight}[1]{%
  \par\vspace{3pt}\noindent\centering
  \fcolorbox{ThemeBlue}{white}{\parbox{0.85\textwidth}{%
    \textcolor{ThemeBlue}{\textbf{Key Insight:}} #1}}\par\vspace{3pt}%
}

\newcommand{\warning}[1]{%
  \par\vspace{3pt}\noindent\centering
  \fcolorbox{ThemeRed!70}{white}{\parbox{0.85\textwidth}{%
    \textcolor{ThemeRed!70}{\textbf{Warning:}} #1}}\par\vspace{3pt}%
}

\newcommand{\mechanism}[1]{%
  \par\vspace{3pt}\noindent\centering
  \fcolorbox{ThemeGreen}{white}{\parbox{0.85\textwidth}{%
    \textcolor{ThemeGreen}{\textbf{Mechanism:}} #1}}\par\vspace{3pt}%
}

\newcommand{\checkpoint}[1]{%
  \par\vspace{3pt}\noindent\centering
  \fcolorbox{ThemeGray}{LightGray}{\parbox{0.85\textwidth}{%
    \textcolor{ThemeGray}{\textbf{Checkpoint:}} #1}}\par\vspace{3pt}%
}

% --- Embedded Paper Figure (for empirical papers) ---
% Convenience macro: embeds a figure with attribution and keyinsight.
% Usage: \paperfigure{page=N, trim=L B R T, clip, width=0.85\textwidth}{material/paper.pdf}{Source: Author (Year), Figure N}{Interpretation text}
\newcommand{\paperfigure}[4]{%
  % #1 = includegraphics options (page=N, trim=..., clip, width=...)
  % #2 = PDF path (relative to compilation dir, e.g., material/paper.pdf)
  % #3 = caption/attribution text
  % #4 = keyinsight text
  \begin{center}
    \includegraphics[#1]{#2}\\[2pt]
    {\small\textcolor{ThemeGray}{#3}}
  \end{center}
  \keyinsight{#4}%
}

\newtheorem{proposition}{Proposition}
\newtheorem{remark}{Remark}

\setbeamertemplate{navigation symbols}{}

% --- Global Vertical-Space Savings (DO NOT REMOVE) ---
% These prevent the most common beamer overflow issues.
\addtobeamertemplate{frametitle}{}{\vspace{-6pt}}
\setlength{\itemsep}{2pt plus 1pt minus 1pt}
\setlength{\parskip}{2pt plus 1pt minus 1pt}
\setbeamertemplate{itemize/enumerate body begin}{\setlength{\itemsep}{2pt plus 1pt minus 1pt}}
\setbeamertemplate{itemize/enumerate subbody begin}{\setlength{\itemsep}{1pt plus 1pt minus 1pt}}
\addtobeamertemplate{block begin}{}{\vspace{-4pt}}
\addtobeamertemplate{block end}{\vspace{-4pt}}{}
\AtBeginDocument{%
  \setlength{\abovedisplayskip}{6pt plus 2pt minus 2pt}%
  \setlength{\belowdisplayskip}{6pt plus 2pt minus 2pt}%
  \setlength{\abovedisplayshortskip}{2pt plus 1pt}%
  \setlength{\belowdisplayshortskip}{4pt plus 1pt minus 1pt}%
}

% --- Footer ---
\setbeamertemplate{footline}{%
  \leavevmode%
  \hbox{%
  \begin{beamercolorbox}[wd=.333333\paperwidth,ht=2.25ex,dp=1ex,center]{author in head/foot}%
    \usebeamerfont{author in head/foot}%%COURSE_NAME%%
  \end{beamercolorbox}%
  \begin{beamercolorbox}[wd=.333333\paperwidth,ht=2.25ex,dp=1ex,center]{title in head/foot}%
    \usebeamerfont{title in head/foot}%%WEEK_LABEL%%
  \end{beamercolorbox}%
  \begin{beamercolorbox}[wd=.333333\paperwidth,ht=2.25ex,dp=1ex,right]{date in head/foot}%
    \usebeamerfont{date in head/foot}\insertframenumber{} / \inserttotalframenumber\hspace*{2ex}
  \end{beamercolorbox}}%
  \vskip0pt%
}

% ============================================================
% BEGIN DOCUMENT
% ============================================================
\begin{document}

\title{%%LECTURE_TITLE%%}
\subtitle{%%WEEK_LABEL%%: %%TOPIC%%}
\author{%%AUTHOR%%}
\institute{%%INSTITUTION%%}
\date{%%DATE%%}

\begin{frame}
  \titlepage
\end{frame}

% --- Slide content goes below (or \input{act1.tex} etc.) ---
